prompt: Use the layout of the reference image to populate cars in the empty parking lot of the source.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Populate the empty marked parking spaces in image 1 with cars. The arrangement, density, and orientation of these newly added cars should precisely replicate the parking layout visible in image 2.
objects: Cars of various types (e.g., sedans, SUVs)
Cars arranged densely in parking spaces
